questionHtml: Show that the speed of the load when it hits the floor is about 2.1 m s−1.
markschemeHtml:
proper use of kinematic equation ✓

2×2.4×0.95=2.14 «m s−1» ✓

 

Must see either the substituted values OR a value for v to at least three s.f. for MP2.

meta.title: Show that the speed of the load when it hits the floor is about 2.1 m s−1.
